questions.text: What is your primary revenue bottleneck today?
How many hours per week does your team spend on manual data entry?
List the top 3 tools in your current 'Frankenstein' stack.
What percentage of your current lead flow is automated?
Do you have active Clarity or Google Tag Manager implementations?
What is your target lead-to-conversion velocity?
What is your total annual spend on recurring SaaS vendors?
Who is your current cloud hosting provider (AWS, GCP, Azure, None)?
Are you prepared for a full migration to proprietary infrastructure?
